requirement_topic.en: ESB Networks Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Network
requirement_topic.zh: ESB Networks并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: ESB Networks併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz電網

summary.en: Ireland's electricity distribution network is operated by ESB Networks, with transmission operated by EirGrid and sector oversight by the Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring ESB Networks supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and connection acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 爱尔兰配电网由ESB Networks运营，输电由EirGrid运营，并由Commission for Regulation of Utilities（CRU）监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成ESB Networks供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及并网验收。
summary.zht: 愛爾蘭配電網由ESB Networks運營，輸電由EirGrid運營，並由Commission for Regulation of Utilities（CRU）監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成ESB Networks供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及併網驗收。

standards_or_laws: ESB Networks electricity network connection and project acceptance (Ireland distribution operator)
EirGrid Grid Code and CRU electricity-sector oversight
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Ireland 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：爱尔兰230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：愛爾蘭230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices (RCD type B or A+DC), metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for ESB Networks review. For sites with constrained or rural feeders, load management and demand limits should be agreed with ESB Networks before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按ESB Networks审查准备。对于供电受限或农村馈线场址，应在出货前与ESB Networks确认负载管理和需量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按ESB Networks審查準備。對於供電受限或農村饋線場址，應在出貨前與ESB Networks確認負載管理和需量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require ESB Networks project review and acceptance under CRU oversight; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ESB Networks approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Ireland 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ireland-ready EVSE needs ESB Networks project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向爱尔兰的EVSE需要ESB Networks项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向愛爾蘭的EVSE需要ESB Networks項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
